reviews.review_title: you can play with friends without Q2-Q3
reviews.review_description:
A short battle game. So even if you don’t have much time, you can still play a few rounds. 

It doesn’t matter if you win or loose, you still get some coins to buy upgrades for your weapons and cosmetics.

You can invite friends, and play togheter. Even if you don’t have a headset.

Positive game, without complex mechanics, which makes the game more dynamic, some of the equipment requires payment, but without donations I can also play comfortably

the only thing I couldn't do - was to combine my profile on the phone with the profile in the VR headset :(

Vortex9 is easily one of the most intense and stylish VR shooters I’ve played. From the moment you drop into the arena, the game throws you into fast paced, high energy combat that really shows off what virtual reality can do.

The movement feels smooth and responsive, which is crucial in VR, and the controls are intuitive enough to pick up quickly while still offering depth for more competitive players. The variety of weapons keeps gameplay fresh, and switching between them mid fight feels seamless. The maps are vibrant and well designed, encouraging both aggressive plays and strategic positioning.

What really stands out is the immersion. Dodging incoming fire, physically aiming your shots, and reacting in real time makes every match feel intense and personal. The sound design and visual effects amplify the chaos in the best way possible.

Whether you’re new to VR shooters or a seasoned player looking for your next adrenaline rush, Vortex9 delivers a polished, action packed experience that’s hard to put down. Highly recommended!

reviews.review_title: A simple but action packed shootout!
reviews.review_description: Tbh, there isn’t anything innovative or unique about the game. However, that’s the beauty of it I think. It’s an addictingly fun game that you just simple jump in and have a shoot out bawl with players as a team or free for all! And it’s free so it’s a no brainer! Highly recommend!

reviews.review_title: For short bursts of fun, DL this
reviews.review_description: It's got a nice cartoony style and quick and simple to learn gameplay. Download it 🙂

I had very low expectations based on the cuteness, but I find my self going back again and again when I need a little break from the day to day. There's always players on, it is super simple to pick up, and it's free. What are you waiting for. Come on in and have your expectations exceeded too! :)

Vortex 9 is a fast-paced multiplayer shooter with a colorful cartoon style and simple mechanics. Easy to learn and quick to play, it focuses on pure fun rather than realism, making it a great free VR shooter for casual matches.
Great shooter! I like that there are pets and other elements that make it more fun! The matches are short and that is a really nice option to be able to jump in for a quick play!
Great game to olay. Its my new game to go  to and play.

This is a direct port of a popular mobile shooter, don't expect much VRness. just point and shoot and change weapons with a button - still solid fun. What I really dislike is the perspective: it's like you're sitting atop the character rather than in his place. Fix this and I add another star.
I tried the game, excellent, menus, style and everything works well. The level design is also excellent and so Finnish, nice to see an old Nokia mobile phone in the graphics 4/5!
